text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time for training, but Symboli Rudolf is
nowhere to be found. Curious, I make my way to
the student council office.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Zzz... Mm... Oh... Air Groove... It's you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sure enough, I find her dozing amid stacks of
paperwork.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
No... I don't need that chair moved... Heh... Chair
move... Air Groove...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like she's sleeping peacefully, so I decide
not to disturb her.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Please accept my earnest apologies for failing to
keep to our schedule.
choice_data_list: Just be more careful next time.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Of course. I will take pains to ensure that this
does not happen again.
